title: Enphase Energy Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: The 22 analysts covering Enphase Energy stock have consensus rating of Hold with average price target of $40.66 forecasting -15.31% decrease in stock price over next year. Buy percentage consensus at 68 indicates some analyst support. 14% recommend Strong Buy, 18% recommend Buy, 45% suggest Hold, 18% advise Sell, 5% predict Strong Sell. For Q2 2026, company estimates revenue $280-310 million including 100-110 MWh IQ Battery shipments and $85 million safe harbor revenue. Positive growth outlook supported by strong U.S. position with expected safe harbor revenue increases and commercial sales. Management implementing cost controls and pricing alignment to improve margins in European market. Innovative services including prepaid lease program and upcoming product launches including fifth-generation battery expected to drive growth and improve profitability.
